---
title: "HAINS"
format: html
editor: visual
---

https://wwwn.cdc.gov/Nchs/Nhanes/2017-2018/P_AUX.XPT

```{r setup}
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, nhanesA)
#haven::read_xpt("https://wwwn.cdc.gov/Nchs/Nhanes/2017-2018/P_AUX.XPT")
```

```{r}
nhanesSearch('Pandemic')
```

```{r}
nhanesSearch('body')
```

```{r}
dd1 <- nhanesSearch('breast') 
dd1 |> 
  filter(Begin.Year == 2017)
```

```{r}
d <- nhanes(nh_table = 'DR1TOT_I')
```

```{r}
d |> head()
```

```{r}
d |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=DRABF)) +
  scale_y_log10() +
  geom_bar()
```

```{r}
d <- nhanes(nh_table = 'P_RHQ')
d |> skimr::skim()
```

```{r}
d |> head()
```
